title: Real RPG
description: You will live a true RPG experience, full of challenges and adventures!
body:
[![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Real_RPG/BH_RRPG_header.webp)](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/real-rpg-quests-dungeons-adventure) version.** ## Bored of simple modpacks where you just explore and build? Need a bigger challenge to really enjoy the experience? Don't worry, Real RPG is a new modpack where you will lead the way, but enjoy completing challenges or killing enemies. Another great new feature is the incorporation of the famous Better Combat mod, which will completely change the way you fight in Minecraft, being, of course, in an RPG style. You will really live an experience like never before! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Real_RPG/BH_RRPG_summary.webp) Real RPG is not a modpack for all types of players, it is for those who love adventure, combat, and above all, missions or game objectives. Additionally, it is the largest modpack I have ever created, far exceeding 300 installed mods. You will live an adventure that is truly different from what you have been able to experience in previous modpacks, with a focus on the achievements and missions section of the game, completely renewed. Are you joining the adventure? ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Real_RPG/BH_RRPG_faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 6GB or 6144 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Real_RPG/BH_RRPG_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vvB2rgn6/images/1ef52fee257d70559c78fc102597f474740ccf88.jpeg) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vvB2rgn6/images/a78e9b552b4d5fc0bd860eb91926711174c9b6c6.jpeg) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vvB2rgn6/images/7b4e3a5d1644e06825eca6e8cd2f7915b1576fe8.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
